message:
fix(tui): resolve compile errors and clippy warnings in compose panel (br-2bbt.17)

- KeyModifiers → Modifiers, CONTROL → CTRL, Esc → Escape (ftui API)
- Fix borrow checker issue in body cursor Down handler
- Make cycle()/new() const fn, unnest or-patterns, cloned→copied
- Add #[allow] for cast_possible_truncation, too_many_arguments, unused_self
- All 45 tui_compose tests passing, 0 clippy warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
